inputs.name: accessibleDescription
inputs.description: Defines the accessible description of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleDescriptionRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that describe the input.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the aria-label attribute for the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id (or many ids) of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Defines the disabled state of the comonent.

inputs.name: displayFormat
inputs.description: Determines the format, displayed in the input field.

inputs.name: formatPattern
inputs.description:
Determines the format, displayed in the input field.

Example:
HH:mm:ss -> 11:42:35
hh:mm:ss a -> 2:23:15 PM
mm:ss -> 12:04 (only minutes and seconds)

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Determines the name by which the component will be identified upon submission in an HTML form.

*Note:** This property is only applicable within the context of an HTML Form element.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Defines the open or closed state of the popover.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description:
Defines a short hint, intended to aid the user with data entry when the
component has no value.

*Note:** When no placeholder is set, the format pattern is displayed as a placeholder.
Passing an empty string as the value of this property will make the component appear empty - without placeholder or format pattern.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Defines the readonly state of the comonent.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Defines whether the component is required.

inputs.name: valueFormat
inputs.description: Determines the format, used for the value attribute.

inputs.name: valueState
inputs.description: Defines the value state of the component.

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description:
Fired when the input operation has finished by clicking the "OK" button or
when the text in the input field has changed and the focus leaves the input field.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired after the value-help dialog of the component is closed.

outputs.name: ui5Input
outputs.description: Fired when the value of the `ui5-time-picker` is changed at each key stroke.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired after the value-help dialog of the component is opened.
